title: penstemon navajoa
intro: Penstemon navajoa, also known as Navajo Pride, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Penstemon navajoa include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Penstemon navajoa can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, or by drying and crushing the plant to make a powder for use in tinctures and salves.
